501.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When the verse "When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest" was revealed to the end, I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ pray a prayer without saying: "Glorified are You, O Allah, and I praise You — O Allah, forgive me."'
501.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika ayat "Apabila telah datang pertolongan Allah dan kemenangan" turun sampai akhirnya, aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ shalat tanpa mengucapkan: "Maha Suci Engkau ya Allah, dan aku memuji-Mu — Ya Allah, ampunilah aku."'

502.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would pray facing the bed on which I lay between him and the qiblah. When I needed to move, I would slip out from the foot of the bed, disliking to pass in front of him.'
502.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat menghadap tempat tidur tempat aku berbaring di antara beliau dan kiblat. Ketika aku perlu bergerak, aku menyelinap keluar dari kaki tempat tidur, tidak suka melewati depan beliau.'

503.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would sometimes become ritually impure during the night while intending to fast. He would sleep, then wake up, and reach morning still in that state. He would then pour water over himself and perform ablution.'
503.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ terkadang dalam keadaan junub di malam hari sementara berniat berpuasa. Beliau tidur, kemudian bangun, dan memasuki pagi hari masih dalam keadaan itu. Beliau kemudian menuangkan air ke atas dirinya dan berwudhu.'

504.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to engage in intimate contact while fasting — for he had the greatest control over his desires of all of you.'
504.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bercumbu sementara sedang berpuasa — karena beliau memiliki pengendalian diri yang paling besar atas syahwatnya di antara kalian.'

505.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I could see the gleam of perfume on the head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was reciting the talbiyah.'
505.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bisa melihat kilau wewangian di kepala Rasulullah ﷺ sementara beliau mengucapkan talbiyah.'

506.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ pawned his armor with a Jewish man and bought food from him.'
506.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ menggadaikan baju besinya kepada seorang laki-laki Yahudi dan membeli makanan darinya.'

507.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I knew how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite the talbiyah.' She would then recite: 'Labbayk, Allahumma labbayk, labbayk — la sharika laka labbayk. Inna al-hamda wa al-ni'mata laka — Here I am, O Allah, here I am, here I am — there is no partner for You, here I am. All praise and blessing belong to You.'
507.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mengetahui bagaimana Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengucapkan talbiyah.' Ia kemudian mengucapkan: 'Labbayk, Allahumma labbayk, labbayk — la syarika laka labbayk. Innal-hamda wan-ni'mata laka — Aku penuhi panggilan-Mu, Ya Allah, aku penuhi panggilan-Mu, aku penuhi panggilan-Mu — tidak ada sekutu bagi-Mu, aku penuhi panggilan-Mu. Sesungguhnya segala puji dan nikmat adalah milik-Mu.'

508.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The night prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ consisted of thirteen rak'ahs, of which five were Witr. He would not sit in any of them except at the very end. When the muadhdhin called the adhan, he would get up and pray two brief rak'ahs.'
508.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Shalat malam Rasulullah ﷺ terdiri dari tiga belas rakaat, di antaranya lima rakaat Witr. Beliau tidak duduk dalam satu rakaat pun kecuali di rakaat paling akhir. Ketika muadzin mengumandangkan azan, beliau bangkit dan shalat dua rakaat ringan.'

509.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ scraped mucus, spit, or phlegm from the qiblah direction of the mosque.
509.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengikis lendir, ludah, atau dahak dari arah kiblat masjid.

510.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Kill the two-striped snake, for it blinds the eyes and causes miscarriage.'
510.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Bunuhlah ular bergaris dua, karena ia membutakan mata dan menyebabkan keguguran.'

511.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'None of you should say: "my soul has become foul" (khabuthat nafsi). Instead he should say: "my soul feels nauseous" (laqisat nafsi).'
511.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah salah seorang dari kalian berkata: "jiwaku menjadi kotor" (khabuthat nafsi). Sebaliknya hendaklah ia berkata: "jiwaku merasa mual" (laqisat nafsi).'

512.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ recite during any part of the night prayer while seated — until he grew older. Then he would sit and recite until thirty or forty verses remained of the surah, then he would stand and recite them, then bow.'
512.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ membaca dalam shalat malam sambil duduk — hingga beliau bertambah tua. Kemudian beliau duduk dan membaca hingga tersisa tiga puluh atau empat puluh ayat dari surah, lalu beliau berdiri dan membacanya, kemudian ruku.'

513.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to bathe with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from a single vessel from which we both scooped water together, due to ritual impurity.'
513.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa mandi bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dari satu bejana tempat kami berdua mengambil air bersama-sama, karena janabah.'

514.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would pray while I lay stretched out between him and the qiblah on the bed on which he and his family slept. When he wanted to perform Witr, he would wake me and I would pray Witr.'
514.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat sementara aku berbaring melintang di antara beliau dan kiblat di tempat tidur tempat beliau dan keluarganya tidur. Ketika beliau ingin melakukan Witr, beliau membangunkanku dan aku shalat Witr.'

515.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded Abu Bakr to lead the people in prayer during his illness. So he led them in prayer.'
515.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan Abu Bakar untuk mengimami orang-orang dalam shalat selama sakitnya. Maka ia pun mengimami mereka dalam shalat.'

516.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when it was said that Safiyyah was menstruating, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Perhaps she will delay us.' It was said: 'O Messenger of Allah, she has already performed the Tawaf al-Ifadah.' He said: 'Then there is no problem.'
516.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika dikatakan bahwa Shafiyyah sedang haid, Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Mungkin ia akan menunda kita.' Dikatakan: 'Wahai Rasulullah, ia sudah melakukan Tawaf Ifadhah.' Beliau bersabda: 'Kalau begitu tidak ada masalah.'

517.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a woman was mentioned to the Prophet ﷺ who did not sleep at night. He said: 'Take on only as much worship as you are able. By Allah, Allah does not tire until you tire. The most beloved religion to Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, is that which its doer persists in.'
517.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita disebutkan kepada Nabi ﷺ yang tidak tidur di malam hari. Beliau bersabda: 'Lakukanlah hanya sebatas ibadah yang kalian mampu. Demi Allah, Allah tidak bosan hingga kalian yang bosan. Agama yang paling dicintai Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung adalah yang pelakunya terus-menerus melakukannya.'

518.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'A person in the state of ihram may kill the mouse, the crow, the kite, the biting dog, and the scorpion.'
518.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang sedang berihram boleh membunuh tikus, gagak, elang, anjing yang menggigit, dan kalajengking.'

519.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ — before he passed away, while I was supporting him against my chest — saying: "O Allah, forgive me, have mercy on me, and join me with the Highest Companion."'
519.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ — sebelum beliau wafat, sementara aku menopangnya di dadaku — mengucapkan: "Ya Allah, ampunilah aku, kasihilah aku, dan pertemukanlah aku dengan Teman Tertinggi."'

520.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she used to comb the hair of the Prophet ﷺ while he was in i'tikaf — he would extend his head to her while she was in her chamber and he was in the mosque.
520.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia biasa menyisir rambut Nabi ﷺ sementara beliau sedang beri'tikaf — beliau mengulurkan kepalanya kepadanya sementara ia berada di kamarnya dan beliau berada di masjid.

521.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ was shrouded in three white Sahuliyyah garments.'
521.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ dikafani dalam tiga kain putih dari Sahul.'

522.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), from the Prophet ﷺ, that he said: 'There is no man who dies and a multitude of Muslims pray over him and intercede for him, but their intercession will be accepted.'
522.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), dari Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Tidak ada seorang laki-laki yang meninggal dan banyak kaum Muslimin yang menshalatinya dan mendoakannya, melainkan doa mereka akan dikabulkan.'

523.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about a woman who misses fasting and prayer due to her menstrual period. She said: 'That used to happen to us in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ — we were commanded to make up the fast and were not commanded to make up the prayer.'
523.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang seorang wanita yang melewatkan puasa dan shalat karena haidnya. Ia berkata: 'Itu dulu terjadi pada kami di zaman Rasulullah ﷺ — kami diperintahkan untuk mengqadha puasa dan tidak diperintahkan untuk mengqadha shalat.'

524.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform i'tikaf during the last ten days of Ramadan until Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, took him.
524.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa beri'tikaf pada sepuluh hari terakhir Ramadan hingga Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung mengambilnya.

525.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to kiss one of his wives while fasting.'
525.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mencium salah satu istrinya sementara sedang berpuasa.'

526.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the people kept calling for prayer and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not come out to them. In the morning, Umar ibn al-Khattab said: 'The people waited for you all night, O Messenger of Allah.' He said: 'Their situation was not hidden from me, but I feared that the prayer would be made obligatory upon them.'
526.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa orang-orang terus memanggil untuk shalat dan Rasulullah ﷺ tidak keluar menemui mereka. Di pagi hari, Umar bin al-Khattab berkata: 'Orang-orang menunggumu sepanjang malam, wahai Rasulullah.' Beliau bersabda: 'Keadaan mereka tidak tersembunyi dariku, tetapi aku takut shalat itu akan diwajibkan atas mereka.'

527.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never struck a servant with his hand, nor a woman, nor did he ever strike anything with his hand — except when striving in the cause of Allah. Whenever two matters were presented to him, the one he loved more was the easier of the two — unless it was sinful, in which case he was the farthest of all people from sin. And he never took personal revenge for anything done to him — unless the sanctities of Allah were violated, in which case he would take revenge for the sake of Allah.'
527.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah memukul seorang pembantu dengan tangannya, tidak pula seorang wanita, dan tidak pernah memukul apa pun dengan tangannya — kecuali ketika berjihad di jalan Allah. Setiap kali dua hal disodorkan kepadanya, yang lebih dicintainya adalah yang lebih mudah di antara keduanya — kecuali jika itu adalah dosa, maka beliau adalah orang yang paling jauh dari dosa. Dan beliau tidak pernah membalas dendam pribadi atas apa pun yang dilakukan kepadanya — kecuali jika kehormatan-kehormatan Allah dilanggar, maka beliau mengambil tindakan demi Allah.'

528.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'If the Messenger of Allah ﷺ were to see the women of today, he would have forbidden them from going out — or made it unlawful for them to go out.'
528.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seandainya Rasulullah ﷺ melihat para wanita zaman sekarang, beliau pasti akan melarang mereka keluar — atau menjadikan haram bagi mereka untuk keluar.'

529.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she described an incident where the Laith tribe came to the Prophet ﷺ seeking blood retaliation. He offered them compensation and they accepted. Then the Emigrants moved toward them and the Prophet ﷺ commanded them to hold back. He then called them, increased the offer, and when they agreed, he addressed the people publicly, confirmed their acceptance, and the people agreed.
529.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menggambarkan sebuah kejadian di mana suku Laits datang kepada Nabi ﷺ menuntut pembalasan darah. Beliau menawarkan kompensasi kepada mereka dan mereka menerimanya. Kemudian kaum Muhajirin bergerak ke arah mereka dan Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan mereka untuk menahan diri. Beliau kemudian memanggil mereka, menambah tawaran, dan ketika mereka setuju, beliau berbicara kepada orang-orang secara terbuka, mengkonfirmasi persetujuan mereka, dan orang-orang pun setuju.

530.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she described the beginning of revelation: Khadijah said — addressing Waraqa ibn Nawfal who had become a Christian — 'O cousin, listen to the son of my brother.' Waraqa said: 'O son of my brother, what do you see?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ told him what he had seen. Waraqa said: 'This is the Namus — the one sent down to Musa, peace be upon him. Would that I were young! Would that I were alive when your people drive you out!' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked: 'Will they drive me out?'
530.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menggambarkan awal wahyu: Khadijah berkata — kepada Waraqah bin Nawfal yang telah menjadi seorang Kristen — 'Wahai sepupuku, dengarkanlah putra saudaraku.' Waraqah berkata: 'Wahai putra saudaraku, apa yang engkau lihat?' Rasulullah ﷺ memberitahunya apa yang beliau lihat. Waraqah berkata: 'Ini adalah Namus — yang diturunkan kepada Musa 'alaihissalam. Andai aku masih muda! Andai aku masih hidup ketika kaummu mengusirmu!' Rasulullah ﷺ bertanya: 'Apakah mereka akan mengusirku?'

531.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Some Abyssinians performed a display for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He called me and I watched from above his shoulder until I had my fill of watching.'
531.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Beberapa orang Abyssinia menampilkan pertunjukan untuk Rasulullah ﷺ. Beliau memanggilku dan aku menonton dari atas bahunya hingga aku puas menonton.'

532.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to play with dolls in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. The Prophet ﷺ would bring my companions to play with me. When they saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, they would hide from him. But the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would send them back to me to play with me.'
532.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa bermain boneka di zaman Rasulullah ﷺ. Nabi ﷺ biasa membawa teman-temanku untuk bermain bersamaku. Ketika mereka melihat Rasulullah ﷺ, mereka bersembunyi darinya. Tetapi Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengirim mereka kembali kepadaku untuk bermain bersamaku.'

533.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said on that day: 'Let the Jews know that in our religion there is latitude. I have been sent with the upright, easy-going way.'
533.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda pada hari itu: 'Hendaklah orang-orang Yahudi mengetahui bahwa dalam agama kami ada keluasan. Aku diutus dengan agama yang lurus lagi mudah.'

534.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, whenever he prayed a prayer, would maintain it consistently. The most beloved prayer to him was the one persisted in. He said: 'Indeed Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, does not tire until you tire.'
534.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ, setiap kali shalat suatu shalat, selalu melakukannya secara konsisten. Shalat yang paling dicintai beliau adalah yang dilakukan secara terus-menerus. Beliau bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung tidak bosan hingga kalian yang bosan.'

535.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The month in which the Messenger of Allah ﷺ fasted the most was Sha'ban — for he used to fast it entirely.'
535.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Bulan yang paling banyak Rasulullah ﷺ berpuasa di dalamnya adalah Sya'ban — karena beliau biasa berpuasa seluruhnya.'

536.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'On the night of departure I said: O Messenger of Allah, they are returning with both Umrah and Hajj while I return with only Hajj. So he sent my brother with me and I performed Umrah. I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ climbing toward the people of Madinah while I was climbing toward the people of Makkah.'
536.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Pada malam keberangkatan aku berkata: Wahai Rasulullah, mereka pulang dengan umrah dan haji sementara aku hanya pulang dengan haji. Maka beliau mengirim saudaraku bersamaku dan aku melakukan Umrah. Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ mendaki menuju orang-orang Madinah sementara aku mendaki menuju orang-orang Makkah.'

537.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to kiss her while fasting and would touch her tongue with his.'
537.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menciumnya sementara sedang berpuasa dan menyentuh lidahnya dengan lidahnya.'

538.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The prayer was prescribed as two rak'ahs. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ added to the prayer for residents, and left the traveler's prayer as it was.'
538.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Shalat diwajibkan dua rakaat. Rasulullah ﷺ menambah shalat untuk yang mukim, dan membiarkan shalat musafir sebagaimana adanya.'

539.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to play with dolls in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He would bring my companions to me. When they saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, they would hide from him. But the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would send them back to me to play with me.'
539.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa bermain boneka di zaman Rasulullah ﷺ. Beliau biasa membawa teman-temanku kepadaku. Ketika mereka melihat Rasulullah ﷺ, mereka bersembunyi darinya. Tetapi Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengirim mereka kembali kepadaku untuk bermain bersamaku.'

540.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a woman came whose daughter's hair had fallen out from illness, and her husband wanted her to connect some hair. She came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'My husband wants me to attach hair extensions to her.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'May Allah curse those who attach hair extensions.'
540.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita datang yang rambut putrinya rontok akibat sakit, dan suaminya ingin agar ia menyambung rambut tersebut. Ia datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Suamiku ingin aku menambahkan sambungan rambut padanya.' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Semoga Allah melaknat orang-orang yang menambahkan sambungan rambut.'

541.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when he performed ablution, would run water through his beard.
541.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ, ketika berwudhu, biasa mengalirkan air melalui janggutnya.

542.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when he performed ablution, would run water through his beard.'
542.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ, ketika berwudhu, biasa mengalirkan air melalui janggutnya.'

543.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I knocked on the door while the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was standing in prayer. He walked sideways toward the qiblah — either to his right or to his left — until he opened the door for me, then returned to his prayer spot.'
543.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mengetuk pintu sementara Rasulullah ﷺ sedang berdiri dalam shalat. Beliau berjalan ke samping menuju kiblat — baik ke kanannya maupun ke kirinya — hingga beliau membukakan pintu untukku, kemudian kembali ke tempat shalatnya.'

544.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she used to comb the hair of the Prophet ﷺ while she was menstruating and he was in i'tikaf in the mosque. He would extend his head to her while she was in her chamber.
544.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia biasa menyisir rambut Nabi ﷺ sementara ia sedang haid dan beliau sedang beri'tikaf di masjid. Beliau mengulurkan kepalanya kepadanya sementara ia berada di kamarnya.

545.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) through Safiyyah bint Shayba or Mu'adhah, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to bathe with about a mudd of water — or a sa' of water.
545.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) melalui Shafiyyah binti Syaibah atau Mu'adzah, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mandi dengan sekitar satu mudd air — atau satu sha' air.

546.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to bathe with a sa' of water and perform ablution with about a mudd.
546.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa mandi dengan satu sha' air dan berwudhu dengan sekitar satu mudd.

547.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she used to take on debt. She was asked: 'What makes you take on debt when you have the means to do without it?' She said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "No servant who takes on debt with the intention of repaying it, but Allah will provide him with assistance." So I seek that assistance.'
547.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia biasa berutang. Ia ditanya: 'Apa yang membuatmu berutang padahal kamu mampu untuk tidak melakukannya?' Ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada seorang hamba yang berutang dengan niat untuk melunasinya, melainkan Allah akan memberikan bantuan kepadanya." Maka aku mencari bantuan itu.'

548.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) through Shumaysa that the Prophet ﷺ forbade wine made in clay jars.
548.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) melalui Shumaysa bahwa Nabi ﷺ melarang minuman anggur yang dibuat dalam tempayan tanah liat.

549.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ would not sit after his prayer longer than it takes to say: "O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace — blessed are You, O Possessor of Majesty and Honor."'
549.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ tidak duduk setelah shalatnya lebih lama dari waktu yang diperlukan untuk mengucapkan: "Ya Allah, Engkau adalah As-Salam dan dari-Mu datang keselamatan — Maha Berkah Engkau wahai Pemilik Keagungan dan Kemuliaan."'

550.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wanted to be intimate with one of us while she was menstruating, he would command her to put on a waist-wrap. And when he wanted to sleep while in a state of ritual impurity, he would perform ablution as for prayer.'
550.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ ingin bercumbu dengan salah seorang dari kami sementara ia sedang haid, beliau memerintahnya untuk mengenakan kain pinggang. Dan ketika beliau ingin tidur dalam keadaan junub, beliau berwudhu sebagaimana wudhu untuk shalat.'
